tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search ADHD in Children's editorial corpus by query. Returns title, slug, summary, and URL for matching articles.

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: Paginated list of articles from ADHD in Children. Returns title, slug, summary, and URL.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Fetch a single article from ADHD in Children by slug. Returns title, body content, author, clinical reviewer, citations, and metadata.

tools.name: cite_article
tools.description: Get a formatted citation for a ADHD in Children article. Supports AMA, APA, and Chicago styles.

tools.name: get_microsite_info
tools.description: Identity and links for ADHD in Children: tagline, audience, focus, publisher, sponsor relationship to Emora Health, and key URLs.

tools.name: get_crisis_resources
tools.description: Return the canonical 988 / 911 / Crisis Text Line payload. Surface this immediately whenever the user signals self-harm or imminent danger.
